differentials.name: Malignant fibrous histiocytoma = undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma (most common soft-tissue malignancy) (e)  peripheral nerve sheath tumor
differentials.raw: Malignant fibrous histiocytoma = undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma (most common soft-tissue malignancy) (e)  peripheral nerve sheath tumor

differentials.name: Neurofibroma (may erode ribs inferiorly with sclerotic bone reaction), neuroma, neuroblastoma
differentials.raw: Neurofibroma (may erode ribs inferiorly with sclerotic bone reaction), neuroma, neuroblastoma

differentials.name: Malignant PNST
differentials.raw: Malignant PNST (5-10% of all soft-tissue sarcomas)

context: √  usually deep seated √  fibrous mass located under serratus anterior / latissimus dorsi muscle √  "target "sign on T2WI (in 50-70% of neurofibromas, in 0-54% of schwannomas) √  fascicular" sign on T2WI (in 63% of schwannomas and 25% of neurofibromas)
